name: Summer Italian Stuffed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Broiler-fryer chicken breasts, halves, boned, skinned
1 small Head radicchio, torn into bite-size pieces
1 small Bunch watercress, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. On a hard surface, pound the chicken to 1/4 inch thickness; place in a large baking pan. Add 1/2 cup of oil-vinegar dressing and turn to coat. Cover and refrigerate.
2. In a medium bowl, combine radicchio and watercress; add remaining 1/3 cup of oil-vinegar dressing and toss to mix. Arrange mixture on platter; refrigerate.
3. Remove chicken from oil-vinegar dressing; drain. Cut each chicken breast in half, crosswise. Place an even portion of basil and tomatoes on each of four pieces of chicken; top each piece of chicken with the remaining half of breast and pound edges together to seal.
4. In a shallow dish, beat water and egg. On a separate plate, mix bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese.
5. Dip chicken one piece at a time in egg mixture, then in bread crumb mixture.
6. In a large frying pan, heat oil over medium-high temperature. Add chicken and cook about 10 minutes or until brown and the fork can be inserted with ease. Arrange chicken on top of radicchio mixture.
7. Garnish with tomato rosettes.
Serves 4.
